name: Peraso Inc.
business: Peraso is a fabless semiconductor company that develops and sells mmWave ICs and antenna modules for wireless communications, primarily in the 60 GHz unlicensed band for IEEE 802.11ad/ay and in the 24-43 GHz licensed band for 5G. It also previously sold memory ICs but has discontinued that product line. The company sells to OEMs, wireless Internet service providers (WISPs), defense contractors, and consumer electronics manufacturers.

exposures.sentence: We are a fabless semiconductor company focused on the development and sale of: i) millimeter wavelength wireless technology, or mmWave, semiconductor devices and antenna modules based on our proprietary semiconductor devices and ii) performance of non-recurring engineering, or NRE, services and licensing of intellectual property, or IP.
An additional market for our 60GHz mmWave products is military applications requiring secure communications.

In this market segment, wireless Internet service providers, or WISPs, provide their customers with a fixed wireless link to a base station or small cell, thus providing the customer with high-speed access to the Internet.
Other market opportunities for 60 GHz mmWave technology include transportation safety, factory automation, and railway communications.
We are targeting the high-performance, video-streaming market, specifically the virtual reality, or VR, market.

We also had a line of memory-denominated integrated circuits, or ICs, for high-speed cloud networking, communications, security appliance, video, monitor and test, data center and computing markets that delivered time-to-market, performance, power, area and economic benefits for system original equipment manufacturers, or OEMs.

catalysts.event: Initiation of end-of-life for memory IC products
catalysts.sentence: As a result, in May 2023, we initiated an end-of-life, or EOL, of our memory IC products, and fulfilled all outstanding EOL orders of our memory IC products in March 2025.

catalysts.event: Fulfillment of EOL orders for memory IC products
catalysts.sentence: As discussed below, we initiated an end-of-life of these products in 2023, and substantially fulfilled all outstanding EOL orders of our memory IC products as of March 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Entry into At The Market Offering Agreement with Ladenburg
catalysts.sentence: On August 30, 2024, we entered into an At The Market Offering Agreement (the Sales Agreement) with Ladenburg Thalmann & Co. Inc. (Ladenburg) with respect to an at the market offering program, under which we may, from time to time, in our sole discretion, issue and sell through Ladenburg, acting as agent or principal, shares of our common stock.

catalysts.event: Receipt of unsolicited non-binding proposal from Mobix Labs
catalysts.sentence: On June 27, 2025, we confirmed in a public press release the receipt of an unsolicited, non-binding proposal from Mobix Labs, Inc. (Mobix Labs) to acquire all of the Company s issued and outstanding equity securities in exchange for newly issued shares of Mobix Labs common stock, with a fixed exchange ratio based on the average daily closing price of our common stock over the 30 calendar days ending on June 11, 2025, plus a 20% premium, or approximately $1.20 per share.
On July 11, 2025, we issued a press release announcing the initiation of the strategic review process.

On September 29, 2025, Mobix Labs delivered another letter to our board of directors reiterating its interest in a business combination and submitting what it described as a definitive proposal to acquire all outstanding shares of the Company for $1.30 per share, consisting of a mix of cash and Mobix Labs common stock, and also separately requested our cooperation with respect to an anticipated registration statement on Form S-4.

catalysts.event: Execution of mutual confidentiality agreement with Mobix Labs
catalysts.sentence: On October 30, 2025, we entered into a mutual confidentiality agreement with Mobix Labs in connection with our ongoing review of strategic alternatives.

catalysts.event: Mobix Labs issued press release indicating continued discussions
catalysts.sentence: On January 21, 2026, Mobix Labs issued a press release, and we filed a Current Report on Form 8-K disclosing that the Company and Mobix Labs continue to engage in discussions regarding a potential strategic transaction and are conducting customary, confidential diligence and that Mobix Labs delivered to the Company a non-binding indication of interest contemplating a potential all-stock transaction at a premium to the Company s trading price, subject to further diligence, negotiation, and the execution of definitive documentation.

catalysts.event: NTIA shift to technology-neutral approach for BEAD funding
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, the NTIA espoused a shift to a technology-neutral approach including all forms of FWA, including services enabled by our 60GHz mmWave wireless technology.

tamClaims.claim: Global mmWave technology market valued at $3.4 billion in 2024, growing at 20% CAGR to 2032
tamClaims.sentence: In an August 2024 report titled, Millimeter Wave Technology , Allied Market Research valued the global mmWave technology market at $3.4 billion, and forecasted it to grow at a 20% compound annual growth rate from 2024 to 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 2 million mmWave-enabled CPE units expected by 2026
tamClaims.sentence: In its report, 5G Millimeter Wave 2023 , Mobile Experts Inc. forecasts a total volume of approximately 2 million mmWave-enabled CPE units by 2026.

tamClaims.claim: 2.6 billion people worldwide lack Internet access
tamClaims.sentence: In a December 2023 report, the International Telecommunications Union, or ITU, reported that an estimated 2.6 billion people, or one-third of the global population, does not have Internet access.

tamClaims.claim: Over 1.1 billion people live in informal settlements
tamClaims.sentence: As of August 2023, the World Economic Forum estimated there were over 1.1 billion people living in informal settlements around the world.

tamClaims.claim: T-Mobile fixed wireless available to over 50 million homes; Verizon to over 40 million
tamClaims.sentence: According to Fierce Wireless, T-Mobile is available to over 50 million homes, and Verizon is available to over 40 million homes.
